title: SelfContinuityResult
description: Output of the self-continuity classifier for a single SelfContinuityCase fixture. Documents computed scores, classification, and all preserved breaks.

case_id.description: ID of the fixture that was classified.

s_score.description: Computed S score using the full formula. For suspension cases: S_suspended = P·O·B·K·N·R (C_fielding set to 1 for the suspended-state formula). null if any required component is null.

formula_used.description: Which formula was applied. Suspended formula is used when field_status = field_suspended_resumable and restart_status is not null.

scores_computed.description: The scores as used in the computation.

classification_rationale.description: Structural reason for this classification. Not a narrative defense — a mechanistic account.

pattern_survives.description: Does the informational/functional pattern survive? Necessary but not sufficient.

field_survives.description: Does the phenomenal field survive? null = unresolvable.

ownership_survives.description: Does inhabited ownership survive? null = unresolvable.

n_override_applied.description: True if N=0 forced classification to branching_descendant_not_single_self regardless of other scores.

breaks_preserved.description: All breaks from the input fixture plus any new breaks discovered during classification.

revision_pressure.description: What this result puts pressure on in the theory.
